설명/키워드: keep the camera on one side of the action line between two subjects so their left/right screen positions stay consistent
효과: 공간 일관성·관계 안정 — 깨면 혼란·불안(의도적 위반 가능)

설명/키워드: between two shots of the same subject move the camera at least 30 degrees to avoid a jarring jump cut
효과: 자연스러운 컷 연결 — 미만이면 점프컷 (편집·멀티샷 설계 룰)

설명/키워드: arrange three figures in a triangular formation, reframed as they move to avoid a flat two-dimensional line
stage figures across foreground and background at different depths, one near and one far
효과: 위계·거리=권력 — 전경 인물이 후경 인물 압도 (COMP-31 구도 정합)

설명/키워드: keep eyelines geographically consistent — who looks where must match their staged positions
효과: 시선 공간 일치 — 어긋나면 관계 붕괴 (VR-23 시선벡터·EM-12/13 연계)

설명/키워드: place the dominant figure higher, more central, or further forward than the others
효과: 높이·중앙·전진=권력 — 풍자 권력관계 핵심 (VR-28 앵글=태도 정합)

설명/키워드: stage entrances and exits through framed thresholds (door, gate) defining who enters whose space
stage two figures in dynamic balance — facing, side-by-side, or one turned away
stage a crowd with depth and a clear focal figure standing out from the uniform mass
효과: 개인↔집단 대비 — 군중 속 한 명=고립/지도자 (COMP-22 규모 병치)

설명/키워드: one figure advances while the other retreats or holds ground, blocking the push-pull of power
효과: 압박·우위 다툼 — 다가감=공세·물러남=수세 (M41 리버스 트래킹과 세트)

설명/키워드: change the staged distance between figures over the shot — closing intimate or pulling coldly apart
one figure physically blocks, turns their back on, or steps in front of another
stage one figure seated while the other stands over them
stage figures encircling a single central subject, closing a ring around them
효과: 포위·압박·심판 — 다수가 한 명을 둘러쌈 (COMP-03 둘러싸여 정합)

설명/키워드: stage figures in a rigid line or rank facing front, symmetrical formation behind a leader
stage two figures flanking a single subject on both sides, hemming them in
stage all figures small and far in a wide frame, none dominating, observed from outside
효과: 냉정·관찰·소외 — 인물을 멀리 두어 거리감 (COMP-17 여백·VR-24 제공 정합)

설명/키워드: stage a reacting figure in the background watching the foreground action
효과: 증인·여론·반응 — 후경 인물이 사건을 보고 있음(풍자 코러스)
